any undeclared-identifier program in §4.1 state. Cast-target validation (the P10
Coverage matrix — 4 StatementVerifier emission sites + 6 Elaboration expression-context cases:
Expr-a: Elaboration IDENTIFIER in typed-var-decl RHS → Context.EXPRESSION
Expr-b: Elaboration IDENTIFIER in if/elif condition → Context.EXPRESSION
Expr-c: Elaboration IDENTIFIER in while condition → Context.EXPRESSION
Expr-d: Elaboration IDENTIFIER in return value → Context.EXPRESSION
Expr-e: Elaboration IDENTIFIER in binary operand → Context.EXPRESSION
PITFALL #17 guard: MODULE-kind calls must NOT emit UnknownIdentifier (only LOCAL kind).
OQ-11.1=best-effort guard: multiple undeclared names in one program → multiple errors.
Elaboration lambda-body coverage: undeclared name in lambda body function call.

positive_entries.name: pos-01-declared-assignment-basic
positive_entries.rationale: Declared var assigned in function body. verifyVarAssignment looks up 'x', finds it in scope, no UnknownIdentifier emitted. Basic positive control for ASSIGNMENT_LHS site.

positive_entries.name: pos-02-declared-increment-and-decrement
positive_entries.rationale: Declared var incremented and decremented. verifyIncrement looks up 'n', finds it, no UnknownIdentifier for either ++ or --. Covers positive side of both INCREMENT_TARGET paths.

positive_entries.name: pos-03-for-collection-declared
positive_entries.rationale: For-loop over a declared collection. OQ-11.6=strict: scope.lookup('items') finds the int[] var; no FOR_COLLECTION error emitted. Iterator 'item' declared into body scope (IntType per P10 implicit-int). 'item' visible in body — verifies cleanly.

positive_entries.name: pos-04-local-function-call-declared
positive_entries.rationale: LOCAL function call to declared 'helper'. Pass 1.5 pre-declares 'helper' into module scope before 'go' body is walked. verifyFunctionCallStatement: scope.lookup('helper') != null → no UnknownIdentifier. OQ-11.6=strict positive control.

positive_entries.name: pos-05-module-call-not-checked
positive_entries.rationale: PITFALL #17 guard: MODULE-kind call to 'Other::doWork'. verifyFunctionCallStatement checks `s.call.kind == FunctionCallData.Kind.LOCAL` before the scope lookup. MODULE kind short-circuits the check; no UnknownIdentifier emitted even though 'Other' and 'doWork' are not in scope. Negative-space positive: ensures the guard condition fires correctly.

positive_entries.name: pos-06-toplevel-var-visible-in-function
positive_entries.rationale: Top-level var 'count' visible inside function body. Module-scope SymbolTable is the parent of functionScope. verifyVarAssignment for 'count = 10' walks the scope chain, finds 'count' in module scope. No ASSIGNMENT_LHS error. Guards module-scope-to-function-body inheritance.

positive_entries.name: pos-07-forward-function-reference
positive_entries.rationale: Forward reference: 'go' calls 'helper' declared after it. Pass 1.5 pre-declares ALL functions into module scope before walking ANY body. scope.lookup('helper') in verifyFunctionCallStatement finds the pre-declared entry. No UnknownIdentifier emitted. Guards the Pass 1.5 pre-declare invariant.

positive_entries.name: pos-08-binary-op-both-operands-declared
positive_entries.rationale: Binary op with both declared operands. Elaboration.elaborateExpression for BINARY_OP recurses into left (Identifier 'a') and right (Identifier 'b'). scope.lookup('a') and scope.lookup('b') return SymbolInfo from functionScope (declared as arguments). No EXPRESSION errors. Guards Elaboration's binary-operand walk.

positive_entries.name: pos-09-array-index-with-declared-array
positive_entries.rationale: Array index on a declared array 'arr'. Elaboration.elaborateExpression for ARRAY_INDEX: scope.lookup('arr') finds SymbolInfo(ArrayType(IntType)). No ARRAY_INDEX_TARGET error. Index expression Identifier('i') also resolves. Guards ARRAY_INDEX_TARGET positive path.

positive_entries.name: pos-10-nested-scope-vars-visible
positive_entries.rationale: Declared vars used at multiple nesting depths. 'n' is a function parameter; 'x' declared inside if-body, assigned inside if-body. while condition uses 'n', body uses 'n--'. All lookups succeed at appropriate scope levels. Guards that scope chain correctly serves inner blocks.

negative_entries.name: neg-01-assignment-lhs-undeclared
negative_entries.rationale: Site 1 (ASSIGNMENT_LHS): StatementVerifier.verifyVarAssignment gets null from scope.lookup('undeclared') and emits UnknownIdentifier(ASSIGNMENT_LHS). Message: 'Cannot assign to undeclared identifier'. Closes OQ-3=C for the assignment-LHS case.

negative_entries.name: neg-02-increment-undeclared
negative_entries.rationale: Site 2a (INCREMENT_TARGET ++): StatementVerifier.verifyIncrement gets null from scope.lookup('mystery') and emits UnknownIdentifier(INCREMENT_TARGET). Message: 'Cannot increment undeclared identifier'.

negative_entries.name: neg-03-decrement-undeclared
negative_entries.rationale: Site 2b (INCREMENT_TARGET --): decrement of undeclared var. Same StatementVerifier.verifyIncrement emission path as ++. The message says 'Cannot increment' for both ++ and -- (per §2.2 spec: Context.INCREMENT_TARGET covers both operators). Guards the -- arm of the same code path.

negative_entries.name: neg-04-for-collection-undeclared
negative_entries.rationale: Site 3 (FOR_COLLECTION, OQ-11.6=strict): StatementVerifier.verifyForBlock checks scope.lookup('things') before body walk; null → emits UnknownIdentifier(FOR_COLLECTION). Body walk continues (best-effort per §2.2 site #4). This mirrors ControlFlowModule.wf which now rejects at verify time per OQ-11.6=strict.

negative_entries.name: neg-05-local-function-call-statement-undeclared
negative_entries.rationale: Site 4 (EXPRESSION, LOCAL call statement, OQ-11.6=strict): StatementVerifier.verifyFunctionCallStatement sees kind==LOCAL and scope.lookup('doSomething')==null → emits UnknownIdentifier(EXPRESSION). This mirrors WhileModule.wf which now rejects. Note: message is 'Unknown identifier' (Context.EXPRESSION), not the ASSIGNMENT_LHS message.

negative_entries.name: neg-06-expression-rhs-typed-decl-undeclared
negative_entries.rationale: Expr-a (EXPRESSION via Elaboration IDENTIFIER): TypedVarDecl RHS is an IDENTIFIER. Elaboration.elaborateExpression for IDENTIFIER: scope.lookup('undeclaredRhs')==null → emits UnknownIdentifier(EXPRESSION) per OQ-11.3=(a). The verifier's StatementVerifier.verifyTypedVarDecl does NOT emit this; only Elaboration does. Guards the OQ-11.3=(a) expression path for typed-var-decl RHS.

negative_entries.name: neg-07-if-condition-undeclared
negative_entries.rationale: Expr-b (EXPRESSION via Elaboration IDENTIFIER in if condition): Elaboration.elaborateStatement for IfBlockData elaborates ifBranch.condition. IDENTIFIER 'missingFlag' → scope.lookup=null → UnknownIdentifier(EXPRESSION). Guards Elaboration's condition-expression walk for if statements.

negative_entries.name: neg-08-while-condition-undeclared
negative_entries.rationale: Expr-c (EXPRESSION via Elaboration IDENTIFIER in while condition): Elaboration.elaborateStatement for WhileBlockData elaborates stmt.condition. 'missingCond' unresolved → UnknownIdentifier(EXPRESSION). Guards Elaboration's while-condition walk.

negative_entries.name: neg-09-return-value-undeclared
negative_entries.rationale: Expr-d (EXPRESSION via Elaboration IDENTIFIER in return value): Elaboration.elaborateStatement for ReturnStatementData: stmt.value = IDENTIFIER 'missingRetVal'. scope.lookup=null → UnknownIdentifier(EXPRESSION). Guards the return-value expression walk.

negative_entries.name: neg-10-binary-operand-undeclared
negative_entries.rationale: Expr-e (EXPRESSION via Elaboration IDENTIFIER as binary operand): BINARY_OP left operand is IDENTIFIER 'missingLeft'. Elaboration.elaborateExpression for BINARY_OP recurses into left. scope.lookup('missingLeft')==null → UnknownIdentifier(EXPRESSION). Guards that Elaboration correctly recurses into binary sub-expressions.

negative_entries.name: neg-11-array-index-target-undeclared
negative_entries.rationale: Expr-f (ARRAY_INDEX_TARGET via Elaboration ARRAY_INDEX): ARRAY_INDEX expression references 'missingArr'. Elaboration.elaborateExpression for ARRAY_INDEX: scope.lookup('missingArr')==null → emits UnknownIdentifier(ARRAY_INDEX_TARGET). Message: 'Unknown array identifier'. Guards the ARRAY_INDEX_TARGET emission site in Elaboration.

negative_entries.name: neg-12-multiple-undeclared-best-effort-accumulation
negative_entries.rationale: OQ-11.1=best-effort: three undeclared names in one program — ASSIGNMENT_LHS ('alpha'), INCREMENT_TARGET ('beta'), FOR_COLLECTION ('gamma'). All three emit UnknownIdentifier. The test verifies at least one error is present (ASSIGNMENT_LHS for 'alpha'). Probes that best-effort accumulation does not short-circuit: all three sites fire rather than stopping at the first error. A single verify_fail substr check on 'alpha' suffices to confirm the program rejects; the implementation's best-effort behavior is separately verified by UnknownIdentifierPropertyTest.

negative_entries.name: neg-13-undeclared-in-nested-if-body
negative_entries.rationale: ASSIGNMENT_LHS inside an if-branch body. JoinAnalysis (verifyBranch) walks the if-branch body: verifyStatement → verifyVarAssignment('missingInner'). scope.lookup('missingInner')==null in the branch child scope AND the enclosing function scope → UnknownIdentifier(ASSIGNMENT_LHS). Guards that scope boundary does not accidentally hide the error.

negative_entries.name: neg-14-lambda-body-undeclared-function
negative_entries.rationale: Elaboration LAMBDA path: lambda body calls undeclared LOCAL function 'nopeFn'. Elaboration.elaborateExpression for LAMBDA: opens child scope, declares param 'x', calls elaborateFunctionCall(body, lambdaScope). Then the explicit LOCAL-kind check: lambdaScope.lookup('nopeFn')==null → emits UnknownIdentifier(EXPRESSION) per OQ-11.3=(a). Guards that the LAMBDA path in Elaboration includes the post-elaborateFunctionCall identity check for the callee name.
